name: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information in an Environment Variable
description: Sensitive data is stored unencrypted in environment variables, making it accessible to other processes, child processes, dependencies, serverless functions, or through logging and debugging output.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM node stores sensitive data (credentials, keys) in STORAGE(environment_variable) in cleartext, accessible to EXTERNAL child processes or logging without CONTROL node enforcing encryption or secrets management
